• [OK] No immediate cockpit warnings — no failing doctor, hook, MCP, or payload signals

• [WARN] Recent failures — recent failures=1
  next: 2 Live opens the event stream; press enter on a failure for detail

• [NEW] Events — new events=3 since 2026-05-07T11:30:00Z
  next: 2 Live opens the event stream and marks current events seen
  detail: recent commands=2

• [OK] Memory review — memory inbox is clear
  next: 4 Memory opens inbox review; use edit/distill or skip for ambiguous candidates
  detail: candidate memories=0
  detail: accepted memories=0
  detail: candidate memory new count=untracked

ACTIVE SESSIONS
• [OK] Sessions — no stale active sessions detected
  next: 5 Sessions lists handoff entry points

• [OK] Doctor — doctor fail=0 warn=0; hook/MCP fail=0 warn=0
  next: 3 Doctor refreshes health checks and shows remediation hints
  detail: doctor: pass=0 warn=0 fail=0
  detail: hooks/mcp: warn=0 fail=0

• doctor: pass=0 warn=0 fail=0
• hooks/mcp: warn=0 fail=0

NEXT ACTIONS

• 4 Memory: review candidate memories conservatively
